en-US.name: Query Boost Pack
en-US.summary: Add 25 extra Grok questions when free daily limit is used up.
en-US.description:
Need more questions today without a subscription?

A Query Boost Pack adds 25 extra Grok Voice questions to your balance. Boosts are used after your free daily questions run out. Buy as many packs as you like.

Tip: Premium is better value if you chat every day.
